Retirement Planning for Lehi & Silicon Slopes Families

You've built a career in Utah's tech corridor. Now it's time to turn those savings, stock options, and 401(k)s into a retirement that works. Local fiduciary advisor since 2009.

LEHI & SILICON SLOPES

Unique Retirement Challenges in Utah's Tech Corridor

Concentrated stock from tech employers

RSUs, ISOs, and company stock can dominate your net worth. Diversifying without triggering a massive tax bill requires careful planning.

Multiple 401(k)s from job changes

Silicon Slopes careers often mean 3-5 employer retirement plans scattered across different providers. Consolidation saves fees and simplifies strategy.

Utah tax considerations

Utah's flat 4.85% income tax and retirement tax credit create unique Roth conversion and withdrawal sequencing opportunities most advisors miss.

High cost of living along the Wasatch Front

Lehi housing costs have doubled in a decade. Your retirement plan needs to account for local inflation, property taxes, and healthcare costs.

We're Right Here in Lehi

1850 W Ashton Blvd, Suite 175. We understand the local landscape because we live and work here.

SCHEDULE CONSULTATION →

How We Help Lehi Families

Three steps to a confident retirement.

GET STARTED
Step 1) Free Consultation ▾

30 minutes at our Lehi office or via video. We review your situation and determine if we're the right fit.

Step 2) Comprehensive Analysis ▾

We model your income, taxes, healthcare, stock positions, and retirement accounts into a complete financial picture.

Step 3) Your Retirement Money Map ▾

A year-by-year visual roadmap coordinating every piece: income, taxes, healthcare, and legacy.
